description: Curated pool for DuberyMNL Facebook story rotation. Covers all 11 product variants with person and product shots.
rotation: time-based, every 4 hours via GitHub Actions cron

prompt.prompt: A portrait photograph of a Filipino female, early 20s, bright natural smile, hair in a loose bun, wearing a denim jacket, wearing ONE pair of Outback Black sunglasses from DuberyMNL -- a real pair photographed in this scene, matching the style shown in the reference image, lenses naturally catching the light and environment of the scene. Solid muted gold background, soft studio light from front-right. Head and shoulders framing, shallow depth of field. The sunglasses sit naturally on the face with real shadows where the frame meets skin. No text, no logo, no overlays. 4:5 aspect ratio, portrait photography.
